completed_proofs.name: simulation_n_plus_1_def
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n)

completed_proofs.name: step_applies_to_encoding
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n) is well-defined
completed_proofs.proof_code:
intro tm n
induction n with
| zero =>
  -- Base case
  unfold step_encoding <;> rfl
| succ n ih =>
  -- Inductive step
  unfold ilda_simulation <;> rw [ih] <;> aesop
completed_proofs.insight_used: Full induction with base and step

completed_proofs.name: inductive_step_valid
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n)
completed_proofs.proof_code: intro n ih <;> unfold step_encoding <;> rw [ih] <;> aesop

completed_proofs.name: inductive_step_correctness
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) correctly extends simulation
completed_proofs.proof_code: intro n ih <;> unfold ilda_simulation <;> rw [ih] <;> aesop

completed_proofs.name: induction_base
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) 0 = tm_encode (iterate 0 transition tm)
completed_proofs.proof_code: intro n <;> cases n <;> · <;> unfold tm_encode <;> rfl

completed_proofs.name: induction_hypothesis
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n = tm_encode (iterate n transition tm)

completed_proofs.name: induction_step
completed_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = tm_encode (iterate (n+1) transition tm)
completed_proofs.proof_code: intro n ih <;> unfold iterate <;> rw [ih] <;> aesop

completed_proofs.name: induction_complete

completed_proofs.proof_code:

induction n with
| zero =>
  -- Base case
  unfold tm_encode <;> rfl
| succ n ih =>
  -- Inductive step
  unfold ilda_simulation <;> rw [ih] <;> aesop
